prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2022–2025年理科组最低位次约11945→12023→13964→16896，近三年持续后移，累计后移约4951名；2025年基准约16896名，位次后移趋势明显；本省理科组计划2022年59人、2023年59人、2024年48人、2025年60人；2026年计划52人，较2025年缩招8人（-13.3%），缩招幅度较大，竞争有所加剧。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 211、双一流；软科主榜排名从2021年第165名持续上升至2026年第135名，近年排名稳步提升，学校综合实力和认可度有所增强；2022年声誉偏负面（宿舍改造问题），近年未见重大负面舆情；抖音热度排名第58位（较热），综合热度约55万，在211高校中关注度中等偏上；未见明显投档断档记录；第五轮学科评估中无A-及以上等级学科，优势学科不突出；但临床医学、计算机类等招生专业对应社会热门方向，对报考有一定吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程及其自动化等专业社会热度高热推荐；临床医学持续推荐；宁夏2026年普通高考总人数约6.6万，较2025年（物理类+历史类约6.59万）基本持平，物理类考生数估算约4.46万，略增约150人；石河子大学位于新疆，距宁夏较远，地域偏好对宁夏考生报考意愿有一定抑制作用；该校在宁夏招生规模中等（理科组50–60人），本地无招生占比优势。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历年位次持续后移趋势、2026年计划缩招8人（竞争加剧）、学校排名稳步上升（吸引力增强）、考生总数基本持平、专业热度整体偏热等因素，在2025年基准16896名基础上预计位次前移（更容易进）；预测最低位次约15494名，区间14994–15994名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2022 to 2025, the minimum ranking for the science group was approximately 11945 → 12023 → 13964 → 16896, with a continuous backward shift over the past three years, accumulating a shift of about 4951 places; the 2025 baseline is approximately 16896, showing a clear trend of ranking decline; the provincial science group enrollment plan was 59 in 2022, 59 in 2023, 48 in 2024, and 60 in 2025; the 2026 plan is 52, a reduction of 8 students (-13.3%) compared to 2025, a relatively large reduction, intensifying competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211, Double First-Class; the main ranking on the Soft Science Ranking has steadily risen from 165th in 2021 to 135th in 2026, with a steady improvement in recent years, enhancing the university's overall strength and recognition; in 2022, reputation was slightly negative (dormitory renovation issue), but no major negative public opinion has been seen in recent years; Douyin popularity ranking is 58th (relatively hot), with a comprehensive popularity of about 550,000, indicating moderate to high attention among 211 universities; no obvious record of enrollment gaps; in the fifth round of discipline evaluation, there are no disciplines rated A- or above, with no prominent advantageous disciplines; however, enrollment majors such as clinical medicine and computer science correspond to popular social directions, attracting some applicants.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Majors such as computer science, electronic information/communication, and electrical engineering and automation are highly recommended due to social popularity; clinical medicine continues to be recommended; the total number of candidates for the 2026 Ningxia general college entrance examination is about 66,000, roughly the same as 2025 (about 65,900 for physics and history categories), with an estimated 44,600 physics category candidates, a slight increase of about 150; Shihezi University is located in Xinjiang, far from Ningxia, and regional preferences have a certain inhibitory effect on Ningxia candidates' willingness to apply; the university's enrollment scale in Ningxia is moderate (50-60 students in the science group), with no local enrollment advantage.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the continuous backward shift in historical rankings, the reduction of 8 students in the 2026 plan (intensified competition), the steady rise in university ranking (increased attractiveness), the basically unchanged total number of candidates, and the overall hot major popularity, based on the 2025 baseline of 16896, the ranking is expected to move forward (easier to enter); the predicted minimum ranking is approximately 15494, with a range of 14994–15994.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Most Difficult to Enter)
- Clinical Medicine (Five-Year)
- Computer Science (Including Computer Science and Technology, Cyberspace Security, Data Science and Big Data Technology)
- Electronic Information Engineering
- Information and Computing Science.
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Moderate)
- Preventive Medicine (Five-Year)
- Economics (Finance, Economics, International Economics and Trade)
- Emergency Management
- Clinical Pharmacy (Five-Year)
- Biological Science (Teacher Training)
- Food Science and Engineering
- Animal Science
- Plant Production
- Biological Sciences
- Agricultural Resources and Environment
- Forestry.
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy to Enter)
- Nursing
- Applied Psychology
- Primary Education (Teacher Training)
- Agricultural and Forestry Economics and Management
- Business Administration (Financial Management, Business Administration, Human Resource Management, Marketing).
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking is within the predicted range of 14994–15994, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main choice, aim for Tier 1 majors as a stretch, and use Tier 3 majors as safety options; if your ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (e.g., within 14500), you can focus on aiming for Tier 1 popular majors such as clinical medicine and computer science; if your ranking is close to the upper limit of the range (e.g., outside 15800), you should mainly rely on Tier 3 safety majors and be cautious with Tier 1 majors.
